payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT c.concert_Name, c.Theme, COUNT(s.Singer_ID) AS singer_count FROM concert c JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON c.concert_ID = sic.concert_ID JOIN singer s ON sic.Singer_ID = s.Singer_ID GROUP BY c.concert_Name, c.Theme;'}

inputs.sql: SELECT c.concert_Name, c.Theme, COUNT(s.Singer_ID) AS singer_count FROM concert c JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON c.concert_ID = sic.concert_ID JOIN singer s ON sic.Singer_ID = s.Singer_ID GROUP BY c.concert_Name, c.Theme;
